Case no.01 — greenhouse couture: nine looks grown from one botanical moodboard

Every designer here keeps a library. Each look is tagged the way it lands in one — the theme you named for it, plus the element you pulled: pattern, palette, silhouette, symbol. One moodboard in, nine directions out.
